hero.mosqueSubtitle: The Abdulkarim Alkhattabi Mosque in Lüdenscheid
hero.welcomeText: A place of encounter, prayer and learning in the heart of Lüdenscheid. We invite you to become part of our vibrant community and experience spiritual growth together.
hero.heroDescription: Discover our daily prayers, educational courses and social projects that strengthen our community.

about.salutation: Dear Brothers and Sisters, Dear Friends and Neighbors in Lüdenscheid,
about.paragraphOne: Like a caravan that finds a place of rest after a long journey, we have established these spaces as a spiritual home. The Abdulkarim Alkhattabi Mosque is more than just a building; it is an open book of our shared history.
about.paragraphTwo: Our walls preserve the silence of prayer, while our doors stand wide open to the future. We nurture the ancient tradition of hospitality and combine it with our present life in the heart of society. A place where knowledge is passed on, community is lived, and hearts are connected.
about.paragraphThree: Step in. Read in our lines, listen to the words and become part of this story that we write together anew every day.

offerings.title: Our
offerings.description: Discover what our mosque has to offer the community.

features.knowledgeDesc: Our programs offer deep understanding of the faith combined with modern pedagogical approaches for children and adults.
features.diversityTitle: A Place of Diversity and Togetherness.
features.diversityDesc: From intercultural encounters to humanitarian aid – we are committed to a strong Lüdenscheid.
